hints.text: Mostly **snow and ice**; any soil is **always dark**
**Penguins** in parts of the coverage — rules out the Arctic instantly

bullets: Half Moon Island: tripod + many people in red jackets
Deception Island: blue-white ship in the bay + abandoned beach equipment; trekker group walking in a line; black-sand beach full of penguins
Cuverville Island: overcast + coastline NW + penguins (east)
Danco Island: beautiful sunset over a snowy fjord
Petermann Island: snow w/ exposed rock patches + overexposed camera
Western tip of Ross Island: extremely dark barren rocky soil
Wooden cabin tripod (grey metal roof) south of the eastern tip
McMurdo Station = the largest base: dark brown soil, many buildings, US infrastructure, sunset coverage (sun sets in the SOUTH — don't get tricked into the northern hemisphere!)
Tripods inside several McMurdo buildings + a small wooden hut east
SE of McMurdo: trekker on ice around machinery
West of Ross Island: fantastical desolate mainland valleys
South of McMurdo: vast snowfield w/ spread-out hills

hints.text: **South Pole tripod**: ring of national flags + 'Geographic South Pole' sign (appears on community world maps for scoring range); the **South Pole Observatory** has tripod coverage around & inside
